title: BEM-841 accept Claude artifacts
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 00:01 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
# Re-scan directly; do not depend on old narrow validator.
roots=[Path('governance/audit_mailbox'),Path('governance/protocols'),Path('governance/reports'),Path('governance/handoff')]
responses=[]; protocols=[]; blockers=[]; candidates=[]
for root in roots:
    if not root.exists():
        continue
    for p in sorted(root.rglob('*')):
        if not p.is_file() or p.suffix.lower() not in ['.md','.txt','.json']:
            continue
        txt=read(p)
        low=(str(p)+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
        if not any(t in low for t in ['claude','клод','internal auditor','protocol','протокол','согласован','multi-agent','мультиагент','decision','approved','change_required','blocked']):
            continue
        is_blocker='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low or 'not a claude approval' in low
        has_decision=('DECISION:' in up or 'решение:' in low or 'decision ' in low) and any(x in up for x in ['APPROVED','CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED'])
        has_claude=('claude' in low or 'клод' in low or 'internal auditor' in low)
        has_protocol=('protocol' in low or 'протокол' in low or 'agreement' in low or 'согласован' in low) and any(x in low for x in ['multi-agent','мультиагент','architecture','архитект','contour','контур','claude','клод'])
        item={'path':str(p),'has_decision':has_decision,'has_claude':has_claude,'has_protocol':has_protocol,'preview':txt[:2000]}
        candidates.append(item)
        if is_blocker:
            blockers.append(item)
        elif has_claude and has_decision:
            responses.append(item)
        if has_protocol:
            protocols.append(item)
status='accepted_existing_response_and_protocol' if responses and protocols else ('accepted_existing_response_only' if responses else ('accepted_existing_protocol_only' if protocols else 'no_existing_artifacts_accepted'))
accepted={'schema_version':'accepted_claude_artifacts.v1','status':status,'accepted_response_paths':[x['path'] for x in responses],'accepted_protocol_paths':[x['path'] for x in protocols],'blocked_paths':[x['path'] for x in blockers],'created_at':created,'validator_rule':'Accept Claude/Internal Auditor/Клод artifacts with Decision APPROVED/CHANGE_REQUIRED/BLOCKED unless blocker markers exist; accept protocol artifacts by protocol/agreement + architecture/multi-agent/context terms.'}
Path('governance/state/accepted_claude_protocol_index.json').write_text(json.dumps(accepted,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/protocols/BEM841_CLAUDE_ARTIFACT_VALIDATION_RULE.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Claude Artifact Validation Rule'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Новая норма: реальный ответ Claude не обязан содержать буквальный маркер `CLAUDE RESPONSE`. Достаточно признаков Claude/Internal Auditor/Клод + Decision APPROVED/CHANGE_REQUIRED/BLOCKED, если нет blocker-маркеров `NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL`, `RUNTIME BLOCKER`, `not treat this as Claude`. Протокол принимается по признакам protocol/протокол/agreement/согласованность + architecture/multi-agent/контур.'+sep+sep+'Accepted response paths:'+sep+''.join(['- '+x['path']+sep for x in responses])+sep+'Accepted protocol paths:'+sep+''.join(['- '+x['path']+sep for x in protocols]))
next_action='process accepted protocol and response into final agreed protocol' if responses and protocols else 'continue locating missing artifact with broad validator'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'protocols_found':len(protocols),'blockers_found':len(blockers),'accepted_response_paths':[x['path'] for x in responses],'accepted_protocol_paths':[x['path'] for x in protocols],'candidates_count':len(candidates),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_accept_existing_claude_artifacts.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_accept_existing_claude_artifacts.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Accept Existing Claude Artifacts | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Responses: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Protocols: '+str(len(protocols))+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem841_accept_existing_claude_artifacts','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'protocols_found':len(protocols),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/accepted_claude_protocol_index.json','governance/protocols/BEM841_CLAUDE_ARTIFACT_VALIDATION_RULE.md','governance/state/bem841_accept_existing_claude_artifacts.json','governance/reports/bem841_accept_existing_claude_artifacts.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Accepted existing Claude response/protocol artifacts using a broad validator and wrote a persistent accepted index plus updated validation rule')
"""
No issue comments.
